intro: Every couple has a vibe. Answer 8 quick questions to find out which kind of couple you two really are — from the Adventurers to the Lovebirds.

options.label: Cozy on the couch with takeout
A nice dinner, planning the week ahead
A candlelit dinner, just us two

questions.text: On a trip, you're the couple that…

options.label: Finds the comfiest café and stays
Gets the giggles in a museum

questions.text: Your shared camera roll is mostly…

options.label: The pet, the couch, dinners in

questions.text: Your biggest strength as a couple is…

options.label: We're still obsessed with each other

questions.text: Your love language as a duo is…

options.label: A warm home and a garden

adventurers.title: The Adventurers
adventurers.description: Life with you two is a highlight reel — new places, new food, the next big plan already booked. You bond through shared experiences and you never, ever get bored.
adventurers.tip: Schedule the occasional do-nothing day; even adventurers need to recharge together.

homebodies.title: The Homebodies
homebodies.description: Your love language is a quiet night in. You're each other's safe place — comfiest on the couch, pet nearby, the rest of the world locked outside.
homebodies.tip: Plan one tiny adventure a month so the cozy never tips into a rut.

powercouple.title: The Power Couple
powercouple.description: You're a team with a plan. Goals, growth, building something real together — you make each other more ambitious, and you actually get things done.
powercouple.tip: Protect time that has no agenda; you're partners, not just co-founders.

bestfriends.title: The Best Friends
bestfriends.description: You genuinely like each other. The inside jokes, the banter, the laughing till it hurts — you're partners in crime first and foremost.
bestfriends.tip: Don't let the friendship crowd out the romance; flirt with your best friend.

lovebirds.title: The Lovebirds
lovebirds.description: Still obsessed, still holding hands, still a little googly-eyed. Affection is your default setting, and absolutely everyone can tell.
lovebirds.tip: Keep building shared experiences too, so all that romance has a life to grow in.
